name: CRM Contacts
description: Full-featured contact management for CRM — create, search, tag, and track contacts with profiles, communication history, and team collaboration.
author: AENEWS

capabilities.name: contacts
capabilities.description: Provides the Contact data object — the central entity for CRM contacts with full profile management.

capabilities.name: contacts-list
capabilities.description: Adds the Contacts list view with search, filter, sort, and bulk actions.

capabilities.name: contacts-detail
capabilities.description: Adds the Contact detail view with profile, timeline, notes, and related records.

capabilities.name: contact-tools
capabilities.description: Registers AI-callable tools for creating, searching, and managing contacts.

migrations.name: create_contacts_table
migrations.up: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plugin_crm_contacts (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL, first_name TEXT NOT NULL, last_name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT UNIQUE, phone TEXT, company TEXT, title TEXT, tags TEXT DEFAULT '[]', status TEXT DEFAULT 'active', metadata TEXT DEFAULT '{}', created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')), updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_contacts_tenant ON plugin_crm_contacts(tenant_id); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_contacts_name ON plugin_crm_contacts(first_name, last_name); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_contacts_email ON plugin_crm_contacts(email);

permissions.name: Read Contacts
permissions.description: Allows viewing contact profiles, lists, and details.

permissions.name: Write Contacts
permissions.description: Allows creating, editing, and deleting contacts.

settings.label: Default Contacts View
settings.description: The default layout shown when navigating to the Contacts page.

settings.label: Custom Field Order
settings.description: Customize the order of fields in the contact detail view. Provide an array of field keys.

settings.label: Auto-tag New Contacts
settings.description: Automatically assign default tags to newly created contacts.

settings.label: Default Tags for New Contacts
settings.description: Array of tag names to apply when auto-tag is enabled.

events.description: Emitted when a new contact is created in the system.
Emitted when an existing contact is modified.
Emitted when a contact is permanently deleted.
